name: perfwire
description: AI-assisted wiring planner for hand-soldered perfboards (universal board / protoboard). Generates board-state JSON from a netlist/schematic, runs solver.py to place/route/audit, and audits the human-edited result from the index.html drag editor against physical reality. Use for perfboard / protoboard / universal board / jumper wiring / solder bridge / wiring plan / netlist-to-board requests. ユニバーサル基板・穴あき基板・配線計画・はんだブリッジ・perfwire の依頼で使用。
